documents.title: Solana Core Engineering
documents.description: Core protocol, Anchor, and secure program patterns.

documents.title: Solana Advanced Systems
documents.description: DeFi architecture, runtime performance, and production hardening.

documents.title: PDA Derivation Drill
documents.prompt: Implement PDA derivation with deterministic seeds and bump checks.
documents.expectedOutput: Derived PDA matches expected address and bump.

documents.title: Anchor Constraints Lab
documents.prompt: Harden an instruction by applying ownership, mutability, and signer constraints.
documents.expectedOutput: Invalid accounts are rejected by constraints.

documents.title: Signer Authorization Test
documents.prompt: Patch an instruction so only authorized signers can mutate state.
documents.expectedOutput: Unauthorized caller path fails with custom error.

documents.title: Risk Guardrails
documents.prompt: Add liquidation threshold and health-factor checks to a lending flow.
documents.expectedOutput: Unsafe positions are blocked before execution.

documents.title: Compute Budget Optimization
documents.prompt: Refactor a hot path to reduce compute usage and account lock contention.
documents.expectedOutput: Execution remains correct with lower compute consumption.

documents.title: Solana Runtime Fundamentals
documents.markdown:
## Runtime Basics
Learn account ownership, rent, and execution model fundamentals.

documents.title: PDA Fundamentals
documents.markdown: Implement deterministic PDA derivation and validation.

documents.title: Anchor Accounts and Context
documents.markdown:
## Anchor Core
Model account structs and instruction contexts safely.

documents.title: Constraint-Driven Safety
documents.markdown: Apply account constraints to reject invalid instruction inputs.

documents.title: Threat Modeling Solana Programs
documents.markdown:
## Threat Modeling
Identify authority, replay, and CPI risk surfaces.

documents.title: Authorization in Practice
documents.markdown: Patch signer validation and privilege boundaries.

documents.title: AMM and Lending Primitives
documents.markdown:
## DeFi Primitives
Compare liquidity and debt models on Solana.

documents.title: Compute Budget Fundamentals
documents.markdown:
## Compute Units
Measure and reduce compute costs in hot instructions.

documents.title: Parallelism and Account Locks
documents.markdown:
## Throughput
Design state access to minimize lock contention.

documents.title: Optimization Lab
documents.markdown: Refactor instruction flow for lower compute and better throughput.

documents.title: Solana Bootcamp 101
documents.summary: Start building with Solana from first principles.
documents.description: Hands-on intro to Solana architecture, accounts, and PDAs.
documents.badgeDescription: Awarded for completing the Solana fundamentals bootcamp.
documents.badgeCriteria: Complete all lessons and pass the PDA challenge.

documents.title: Anchor Core Patterns
documents.summary: Build safer Solana programs with Anchor constraints.
documents.description: Practical Anchor patterns for accounts, validation, and errors.
documents.badgeDescription: Awarded for mastering Anchor account and instruction patterns.
documents.badgeCriteria: Complete all modules and pass the constraints lab.

documents.title: Solana Security Basics
documents.summary: Understand and mitigate common Solana smart contract risks.
documents.description: Security fundamentals across authorization, CPIs, and state validation.
documents.badgeDescription: Awarded for shipping secure Solana program patterns.
documents.badgeCriteria: Finish both modules and pass the authorization challenge.

documents.title: DeFi Protocol Foundations
documents.summary: Model robust DeFi systems on Solana.
documents.description: Explore protocol mechanics, risk controls, and failure domains.
documents.badgeDescription: Awarded for understanding DeFi architecture and controls.
documents.badgeCriteria: Complete all modules and implement risk guardrails.

documents.title: Solana Performance Labs
documents.summary: Optimize runtime throughput and compute usage.
documents.description: Hands-on labs for account contention, compute budgets, and scaling patterns.
documents.badgeDescription: Awarded for delivering high-throughput Solana program patterns.
documents.badgeCriteria: Finish all labs and pass the optimization challenge.
